_comment: Ken Burns motion engine — loads a still keyframe + plan-row metadata, runs it through RishaMotionSelector to derive deterministic zoom/pan/curve, renders the frame batch, and saves an animated WEBP preview. Swap node 50 (SaveAnimatedWEBP) for VHS_VideoCombine once VideoHelperSuite is in the Modal image. Inputs are patched by RishaPlanExecutor or the orchestrator at queue time.

10._comment: Source still — set image to <keyframe_id>.png from the prior T2I/Edit run.

20._comment: Load the plan row matching the keyframe so motion params flow from the selector, not from manual graph inputs.

30._comment: Authoritative motion selection. Style+composition_notes+motion_intent + duration => kind, curve, params_json.

40._comment: Frame-by-frame Ken Burns. All four override knobs default to 0 (use selector values). Set a non-zero override on a knob to pin that param without re-routing.

50._comment: v1 output — animated WEBP preview, works without any extra custom node packs. Replace with a VHS_VideoCombine block (format=video/h264-mp4) once VideoHelperSuite ships in the Modal image.

60._comment: Audit channel — surfaces the render report (frame count, curve, applied params) in /history so the orchestrator can verify what the selector chose without re-deriving.

70._comment: Audit channel — surfaces the raw params_json for diff against motion_spec.json.
